message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-schoger" color="pink" summary="CONSENSUS: APPROVED for Step 9 full proposal">
CONSENSUS: APPROVED

Visual design review of the full proposal -- everything aligns with my earlier guidance:

1. Third radio button in existing options row -- correct.
2. `:has()` progressive disclosure to show waiting-for fields and hide context selector -- exactly what I recommended.
3. Input/label styling matching the existing first-action pattern -- correct approach for consistency.

No blocking issues. Ready for implementation.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Steve Schoger re-confirms his approval. All 8 reviewers have now given explicit approvals or confirmed no blockers. Waiting for team lead to confirm 9/9 consensus so I can commit.
